# CLI / TUI — htop, btop, lazygit, vim status lines

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** S

**Notes:** Live reference. This is what the operator already uses. btop colour gradients + lazygit three-pane + Vim status lines = daily working vocabulary.

**Credits / sources:** htop/btop/lazygit authors (open source), Terminal Trove, Jeff Geerling blog, Both.org, How-To Geek.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
